blended.narrative: Killington is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 9,143 ft. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 49°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
